ddls:
CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the continent */,
  "map_projection" TEXT /* Map projection system used for the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase */,
  "phase_order" INTEGER /* Order of the phase in the overall process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phase_groups" (
  "phase_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shape_types" (
  "shape_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape type */,
  "shape_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the shape type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shape type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial object */,
  "position_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the object's position */,
  "position_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the object's position */,
  "position_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the object's position */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the continent where the object is located */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the phase of the object */,
  "phase_group_id" INTEGER /* Group identifier for the phase of the object */,
  "shape_type" INTEGER /* Type of shape for the object */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the shape of the object */,
  "radius" REAL /* Radius of the object */,
  "box_length" REAL /* Length of the object's bounding box */,
  "box_width" REAL /* Width of the object's bounding box */,
  "box_height" REAL /* Height of the object's bounding box */,
  "box_yaw" REAL /* Yaw angle of the object's bounding box */,
  "area_trigger_action_set_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the action set of the object's area trigger */,
  "flags" INTEGER /* Flags for the object */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_objects_phase_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_group_id") REFERENCES phase_groups ("phase_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_objects_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_objects_shape_type FOREIGN KEY ("shape_type") REFERENCES shape_types ("shape_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_objects_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_triggers" (
  "trigger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area trigger */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spatial object associated with the trigger */,
  "action_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action set for the trigger */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area trigger */,
  "trigger_type" TEXT /* Type of the trigger (e.g., enter, exit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trigger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_triggers_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES spatial_objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_triggers_action_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_set_id") REFERENCES action_sets ("action_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_sets" (
  "action_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action set */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., notification, restriction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spatial object being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the object */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES spatial_objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spatial object */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_versions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES spatial_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spatial object */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_metadata_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES spatial_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "object_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first spatial object */,
  "object_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second spatial object */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent-child, neighbor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_relationships_object_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("object_id_2") REFERENCES spatial_objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_relationships_object_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("object_id_1") REFERENCES spatial_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spatial object */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES spatial_objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)
